Home.dashboardDescription: Explore our features and find your perfect match:

GeolocationMeeting.title: Find Nearby Connections
GeolocationMeeting.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
GeolocationMeeting.meetingPlacesDescription: Public places near you for potential meetups.
GeolocationMeeting.nearbyUsersDescription: Connect with users in your vicinity.
GeolocationMeeting.noMeetingPlaces: No suggested meeting places found nearby.

FacialAnalysisMatching.title: Facial Analysis & Matching
FacialAnalysisMatching.errorMissingImageUrl: Please enter URLs for both images.

BlindExchangeMode.title: Blind Exchange Mode
BlindExchangeMode.noMatches: No suitable match found at the moment.

ProfilePage.title: User Profile
ProfilePage.description: View and edit your profile information.
ProfilePage.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
ProfilePage.showLocationLabel: Show my approximate location to others
ProfilePage.fetchErrorDescription: Could not load your profile data. Please try again later.
ProfilePage.updateSuccessDescription: Your profile has been successfully updated.
ProfilePage.updateErrorDescription: Failed to save your profile changes. Please try again.

SpeedDating.title: Speed Dating
SpeedDating.scheduleDescription: Select interests you'd like to match on.
SpeedDating.noSessions: No upcoming speed dating sessions scheduled.
SpeedDating.fetchError: Failed to load speed dating data.
SpeedDating.scheduleSuccess: Speed dating session based on your interests has been scheduled!
SpeedDating.scheduleError: Failed to schedule speed dating session.
SpeedDating.selectInterestsErrorDesc: Please select at least one interest to schedule a session.

RiskyWordsDictionary.title: Risky Words Dictionary
RiskyWordsDictionary.description: Analyze your messages for potentially ambiguous or sensitive phrases before sending.
RiskyWordsDictionary.inputTextDescription: Type or paste the message you want to check.
RiskyWordsDictionary.analysisResultsDescription: Potential interpretations and suggestions for clarification.
RiskyWordsDictionary.noRiskyWordsFound: No potentially risky words found in the text.
RiskyWordsDictionary.riskyWordsFound: {count, plural, =1 {One potentially risky phrase found.} other {# potentially risky phrases found.}}
RiskyWordsDictionary.emptyInputError: Please enter some text to analyze.
RiskyWordsDictionary.analysisError: An error occurred while analyzing the text. Please try again.

RewardsPage.title: Your Rewards
RewardsPage.description: Check out the badges you've earned!
RewardsPage.earnedBadgesDesc: Badges earned through your activity in the app.
RewardsPage.noBadges: You haven't earned any badges yet. Keep exploring!
RewardsPage.fetchErrorDescription: Could not load your rewards. Please try again later.
RewardsPage.badge_speed_dater_desc: Participated in a Speed Dating session.
RewardsPage.badge_game_winner_desc: Won a round in the game.
